summary: RETESTE 3 (frontend-only) for EducaFila student flow confirms both MEDIUM issues from iteration 2 are RESOLVED: (A) profile color now persists and applies instantly to queue-item-1 span after save (no reload needed); (B) enterQueue is idempotent and leaveQueue clears all active rows — 3 consecutive enter/leave cycles kept the queue count at exactly 1 item each time. Menu flows (profile, theme, help, app, logout) all functional. Invalid white color is correctly blocked with toast and the previous color is preserved. All 9 requested scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfileDialog.handleSave now uses .update(...).eq(...).select() and surfaces 'Não foi possível salvar' when 0 rows return — good defensive pattern.
StudentDashboard has a dedicated useEffect that re-runs fetchQueue when profile.name_color / display_name_tokens change — confirmed working: color updates immediately without reload.

lib/queue.enterQueue is idempotent (returns existing active row) and leaveQueue deletes ALL active rows for the user in the classroom — duplicates no longer accumulate. The DB UNIQUE INDEX in queue_entries(classroom_id,user_id) WHERE status IN ('waiting','in_bathroom','called') provides a hard guard.

Minor suggestion (non-blocking): enterQueue still does read-max-position + insert client-side; the unique index will now raise on races, but the app currently swallows that insert error silently because handleJoin only surfaces toast on the insert error object — should also refetch and tolerate 23505 gracefully.
Minor: leaveQueue runs a DELETE by user_id for the classroom without scoping school_id — acceptable because a user is bound to one school, but worth tightening if multi-school profiles appear later.
seed_data_creation: None. The 3x enter/leave cycles confirmed no duplicate queue_entries are created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iterations 1 & 2 addressed PGRST200 and the two MEDIUM issues (color persistence, duplicate queue rows). Iteration 3 verifies both fixes hold. Future runs can focus on Gestão/Professor/SuperAdmin flows (credentials still not supplied) and on stress-testing the realtime channel when multiple students enter/leave simultaneously.
rca of the issue: Color-persistence fix: ProfileDialog now requests .select() after update, exposing silent RLS 0-row cases; StudentDashboard listens to profile.name_color in a useEffect and refetches the queue, so the new color lands in the rendered span without reload. Duplicate-rows fix: enterQueue short-circuits when an active row exists, leaveQueue deletes all active rows for the user, and a unique partial index on (classroom_id,user_id) WHERE status IN ('waiting','in_bathroom','called') guards against races. Verified live: 3 consecutive cycles kept queue count = 1; red #dc2626 and green #16a34a rendered immediately; white #ffffff rejected with 'Cor inválida' toast without mutating the saved color.
